nasb.text: and Shem lived five hundred years after he became the father of Arpachshad, and he had other sons and daughters.

esv.text: And Shem lived after he fathered Arpachshad 500 years and had other sons and daughters.

cnv.text: 閃生亞法撒以後，又活了五百年，並且生了其他的兒女。

ccb.text: 之后又活了五百年，生儿育女。

csbs.text: 闪生了亚法撒之后，又活了五百年，并且生了其他的儿女。
